description:
🎀✨What’s On Semester One with Skirts✨🎀

From socials and networking nights to career opportunities and everything in between — we’ve got an exciting semester planned and we can’t wait to share it with you! 💌

Keep an eye on our socials for all the details, sign-ups, and updates! 🫶✨

*Sister Program Kickoff is held on the 10th March

🚨UQIES to San Francisco, here we go! 🚨

UQIES is returning to the San Francisco Bay Area for 15 days inside the global epicentre of entrepreneurship, innovation and technology. 🇺🇸

📅 27 June - 11 July 2026

💰 Approx. $4000 AUD per person

⏳ Applications close Tuesday, 10 March 1PM AEST

Startup visits. Cracked events. Workshops. Founder conversations. If you’re looking to skyrocket your growth as an entrepreneur (or entrepreneur in the making) in 2026, this is your highest ROI opportunity.

Spots are limited. Selection based on quality of application + prior engagement with UQIES and/or entrepreneurship activities.

If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to the UQIES Instagram page, or email us at team@uqies.com.

Pico CTF & CrikeyCon Raffle
Hello everyone! This week for our event we will be creating teams to compete in PicoCTF, which is very beginner friendly (Targeted at HS students). We will also be raffling of some tix for CrikeyCon, if your a member make sure to join the raffle [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeUQk8khcNeTl2bU1Zk3wvHd1M5NC6hssXxGhS7c58uhhsZ6w/viewform)!

📍 Where? 32 - 215
🕒 When? 6pm - 8pm
📅 Date? March 11th (Wednesday)
❓ What? PicoCTF and raffle!
🍕 Pizza? Provided 🗿 (for members)

To get everyone into a team asap on the day, please fill out [this form](https://forms.gle/GnBpdVHUygACkitEA) before the event! We can’t wait to see you all there!

# The funeral event for the beloved CSSE2310 Bomb
@everyone, We warmly invite you to join us in remembering and celebrating the CSSE2310 bomb,  which has unfortunately been taken from us far too soon due to UQ’s new secured assessment policy 😭
**Please bring laptops** as we will be running a reverse engineering workshop in honour of our beloved 2310 A2. 
to show respect to the bomb, **the server will now be in mourning**, with some further details on Wednesday.

Event info:
📍 Where? 32 - 215
🕒 When? 6pm - 8pm
📅 Date? April 1st (Wednesday)
❓ What? The funeral for the CSSE2310 Bomb (A reverse engineering workshop)
👕 Attire? Please dress in black, or dark colours. This will not be strictly enforced.
🍕 Pizza? Provided 🗿 (for members)

🐰 UQISS Easter Picnic
📅 2nd April | ⏰ 3 - 6 PM | 📍 Roma Street Parklands
🥚 Hunt Easter eggs
🍟 Snack on chips & drinks
🍰 Indulge in tiramisu & cake batik
🎨 Get creative with tote bag painting
🎟 Tickets: Members $7 | Non-members $12
🌸 Easter fun with friends- don’t miss out!

🏸 UQ Badminton x UQISS Social Badminton 🏸
Join us for a special collaboration event!
🔗 How to Register: via Linktree link in our Instagram bios

📅 Date: Saturday, 11th April ⏰ Time: 11:00 AM – 2:00 PM 📍 Location: UQ Centre
💰 Pricing:
* $18 – UQ Badminton Association or UQISS members 
* $25 – Non-members

✅ What’s included:
* Shuttlecocks provided
* BUBBLE TEA 🧋 
🏸 What to bring:
* Your own racquet - racquet hire available. 

Come along for 2 hours of badminton and fun, social games afterwards. Tickets limited!! 

We can’t wait to see you there 🎉

Register here if you are coming!!!
https://campus.hellorubric.com/?eid=60699

The day you have all be waiting for is finally here!!!
UQSLA’s Sri Lankan New Years festival is back and bigger than EVER🤩

This event is for EVERYONE so make sure to bring all your friends and family along❤️🇱🇰

#srilanka #newyears #uqsla

Clearly you have no idea what’s coming for you… 😈😘

UQ… you thought Mondays were just another day?
Nah. We’re about to turn them into a whole Bollywood EXPERIENCE 💃🏽🕺🏽

This isn’t just dance classes.
This is TS bringing the ENERGY, the VIBE and the CULTURE straight to you.

In collaboration with The Best
UQISC × UQ Naatak 🤝✨

📍 Starting Soon! 13th April
📅 Every Monday
⏰ 4–6PM
💸 $8.50 Members (UQISC/UQ Naatak)
💸 $10 Non-Members
🚶 Walk in & pay
🕺 Absolute beginners to experienced dancers
🔥 Zero judgement

Trust us… this is about to be the best part of your week 😮‍🔥

This Wednesday, we are proudly hosting a talk from one of the largest tech companies in the world, Atlassian! They will be imparting on us some wisdom about security in regards to their company. Atlassian is Australia's largest tech company,  developing well known software such as Jira, Trello, and Bitbucket!

Are you passionate about building a safer digital world? Curious about how global tech companies protect their products and users? Join us for Security @ Atlassian, where you’ll discover exciting opportunities to kickstart your career in security!

Atlassian is a global leader in collaboration and productivity software, trusted by millions of users worldwide. Security is at the heart of everything they do, and their dedicated teams work tirelessly to keep their products and customers safe.

We’re excited to share that the event will be presented by someone who started their journey at Atlassian as an intern and grad, and has since grown their career within our security organisation. They’ll share their personal experiences, insights, and tips for making the most of your early career at Atlassian.

Whether you’re just starting out or looking to take the next step, this is a fantastic opportunity to connect with Atlassian's team, ask questions, and explore how you can build your future with Atlassian Security!

📍 Where? 32 - 215
🕒 When? 6pm - 8pm
📅 Date? April 15th (Wednesday)
❓ What? Security @ Atlassian, presented by Atlassian!
🍕 Pizza? Provided (for members)

Tired of having a great idea but no one to build it with? come swipe right on your cofounder irl 💛

Not your typical speed dating 👀
This one’s for ideas, ambition and building something real (who knows tho, you might end up meeting the love of your life) ❤️‍🩹🤭

Speed cofounding night is happening Apr 17 at GCI Building, 5pm. free pizza, good convos, and maybe your next business partner. 🚀🚀

members $3 | link in bio to register 👆

Open Roundtable Session – Everyone Welcome!

Curious about how AI is transforming the way consumers make decisions, and what that means for marketers? Join our Roundtable Session to explore exactly that.

For those already signed up, it’s a chance to get a head start, refine your ideas, and receive tailored support for your work. Beyond that, this session is open to everyone, so whether you’re competing or simply interested, come along to learn, ask questions, and gain fresh insights.

📍 Venue: Therapies Building 84A-325
🕒 Time: 12:00 – 2:00 PM
📅 Date: Wednesday, 22 April

Drop in anytime, bring your curiosity, and be part of the conversation 🚀

#UQBANA #NewishCommunications #UQ #CaseCompetition #BusinessAnalytics #Marketing #StudentOpportunities

Get ready to celebrate the Telugu New Year in absolute style! ✨🌺 We are beyond thrilled to officially announce our biggest event of the season: Ugadi 2026!
We’ve been working hard behind the scenes to bring you a vibrant night that truly captures the spirit and joy of our culture. Whether you’re coming to connect with your roots, catch up with friends, or experience Telugu traditions for the first time, there is something here for everyone.
Prepare yourselves for an amazing evening filled with:
💃 Incredible dance and musical performances by our talented students
🍛 Authentic, mouth-watering food that will bring a taste of home to Brissy
🌿 Beautiful mehendi designs
🎉 And an unforgettable night of celebration, community, and good vibes!
Let’s welcome the new year together and make memories that will last a lifetime. Tag your friends in the comments and start getting your traditional outfits ready! 👇
🗓️ Date: Wednesday, 22nd April
⏰ Time: 6:00 PM - 9:30 PM
📍 Location: Advanced Engineering Building 49-316A
#Ugadi2026 #UQTeluguSociety #UQTELS #UniversityOfQueensland #UQStudents

This Tuesday, 28th April.
⚠️ We all want safety. 
From what harms us, and from what wears us down within us.

But what does real protection actually look like? And what do Surah al-Falaq and Surah al-Naas teach us about turning to Allah in a world full of pressures, fears, and unseen harms? 📖

🌱 Join us this week at Roots as we reflect on two surahs many of us recite often, but may not have truly sat with.

📢 Action Point Reminder📢 
Pass something you learnt last week about Surah Al-Fatiha to a friend, family or anyone!

🍕 Dinner provided 
🗓 Tues 28th April 
🕔 5:00PM 
📍 Sir Llew Edwards 14–116

Early bird has closed and main round tickets are now on sale for GameJam 2026 - our weekend-long hackathon from 8-10 May. Build a game, gamify educational content or develop innovative gaming software - if it's got something to do with video games, we want to see it.

$4500 in prizes across 8 categories!

Best Overall ($1000) | People's Choice ($650) | Best Educational ($500) | Best Multiplayer ($500) | Best Story/Art ($500) | Best XR ($500) | Best Gaming Software ($500) | getcracked.io's Best Technical Execution ($350)

$50 per ticket
$75 per ticket + GameJam Shirt bundle

Missed out on early bird prices? Come to the "Introduction to Game Development Workshop" on the 30th of April, 4-6PM at Hawken Engineering Building (50), Room N202 to score an exclusive discount and get access to early bird prices.

Get them now ! 
https://events.humanitix.com/gamejam-2026

[AHEAD AT ASHURST PRE-PENULTIMATE PROGRAM]

Are you looking to gain an insight into commercial law at a top tier global law firm? 

Ahead at Ashurst is an information evening that provides you the opportunity to explore a career in commercial law with a leading firm. 

Uncover the intricacies of the work, delve into our business operations and practice areas, and receive practical advice to kick start your career with confidence.

Ahead at Ashurst is open to all second and third year undergraduate law students or first year Juris Doctor students. Please complete the registration form below to indicate your interest. 

Key Dates
    •    We will be accepting registrations until 11:59pm on Sunday 10 May 2026.
    •    We will notify students of the outcome of their registration before Thursday 21 May 2026.
    •    The program will be held on Tuesday 2 June 2026, from 5.00pm in our Brisbane office.

Apply here: https://forms.office.com/e/8L3udYRVNz

Hi everyone! UQSRC is opening up two First-Year Representative Spots in our 2026 Management Committee 🤩 If you’re a first year who’s keen on experiencing being an executive with us, we encourage you to submit an application to join our team! 

Check out the role descriptions above, and if interested, please submit your applications by 11:59pm on Monday 11th May 2026 👀

Nomination form link (also in our Linktree in our bio!): https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc2tVfxzYBqzrUV0ezRR5cNWm2ASYcmoPMX8TJD3KtCngVTag/viewform?usp=publish-editor

All applicants will be notified of their nomination outcome by the end of Week 11☺️

"Do we really have time for this?"

UQ ENGG Revue returns in 2026 with our most ambitious show yet. With a cast worthy of Broadway and a writing team who put's Shakespeare to shame. With puns that will have you rolling, and harmonies that will bring a tear to your eye.

This year the Engineering revue takes you on a journey through time. Taking a moment to stop and appreciate the history of engineering, and all those who made it such a pain to study.

SHOW DATES:
Thursday - 13th August
Friday - 14th August

Make your mark in 2026 ✨ Apply now to join the UQIES executive team!

Application form is available via the link in our bio.

The President, Secretary and Treasurer will be elected at the upcoming AGM (date TBA), and the new leadership team will review all exec applications to shape next year’s portfolios. Interviews kick off end of semester.

🚀 Why join?
🤝 Community – find your tribe and connect across UQ and beyond
📈 Growth – take ownership, build skills, and drive real projects
🌏 Impact – shape the future of startups and tech in Australia

Applications close on November 8th.

DM us or email team@uqies.com with any questions.
